mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INSTRUCTOR_FEATURED_COURSE (INSTR_UUID, COURSE_SN, DISPLAY_ORDER) VALUES (#{instrUuid}, #{courseSn}, #{displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT fc.COURSE_SN AS courseSn, c.COURSE_NM AS courseNm, fc.DISPLAY_ORDER AS displayOrder FROM INSTRUCTOR_FEATURED_COURSE fc JOIN COURSE c ON c.COURSE_SN = fc.COURSE_SN WHERE fc.INSTR_UUID = #{instrUuid} ORDER BY fc.DISPLAY_ORDER FETCH FIRST 4 ROWS ONLY
